description: Repair evaluate_expression so it evaluates a small arithmetic expression language without using eval or exec. Support integers, variable names made of letters/underscores, whitespace, parentheses, unary +/-, binary +, -, *, and // with normal precedence and left associativity. Variables are read from the optional variables dict and must be ints; missing variables and boolean values raise ValueError. Integer division uses Python // semantics. Raise ValueError for malformed expressions, empty expressions, unsupported characters, division by zero, and trailing tokens.
